text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O still hasn't arrived for our
training session. Just when I start to think she
might not come at all...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I laid down earlier, intending to rest a little until
it was time for training, but then I fell asleep...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You see, last night, I watched a scary video, and
then it kept popping into my head every time I
tried to shut my eyes.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
To distract myself, I decided to make some
desserts. But I got too into it, and the next thing I
knew, it was morning... That's actually the scariest
part...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry my carelessness caused so much trouble!
I'll be more careful from now on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O seems genuinely remorseful for
her actions, so I let her off with a light warning.
